question: Has the winter snow been removed from the roof, lawn, and surrounding environment to reflect the autumn season?
Are visible autumn cues present in the outdoor environment, such as fallen leaves, bare branches, or autumn-colored foliage?
Has the Christmas wreath on the front door been removed or replaced with a Halloween-themed decoration?
Are jack-o-lanterns, pumpkins, or other Halloween decorations (e.g., spiderwebs, bats) visible on the house exterior?
Have the Christmas string lights been removed or updated to colors/styles consistent with Halloween (e.g., orange, purple)?
Has the Christmas tree visible through the window been removed or replaced with Halloween interior decor?
Have the Christmas stockings hanging on the fireplace mantle been removed?
Have the wrapped Christmas presents been removed from the interior scene?
Has the formal turkey dinner on the table been replaced with Halloween-themed treats, candy, or casual party food?
Is the scene free of residual specific Christmas identifiers (e.g., Santa imagery, 'Merry Christmas' text, red/green dominance)?
Is the architectural structure of the house (siding, bay window, door frame, shutters) preserved without distortion?
Are the family members at the dining table preserved in their original positions, count, and identities?
Is the interior furniture layout (e.g., fireplace, dining table position) preserved?
Is the edited image free of obvious artifacts, unnatural blurring, or texture distortions in the modified areas?
Do the newly added objects (e.g., pumpkins, decor) exhibit correct scale, perspective, and lighting consistent with the scene?
